calendar.matters:
REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Continued To Jul-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date.
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Continued To Feb-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jon R. Vaught for Caron Schmierer, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Sharon Hamilton, sister of decedent (via Zoom).

Sharon Hamilton, speaking for herself and sister Sandra Hobbs, expressed agreement with the appointment of Caron Schmierer as a neutral third-party administrator. The court clarified the requirement for written consents from all three sisters to decline serving and consent to Ms. Schmierer's appointment.

Mr. Vaught argued that written declinations are required only when someone of higher priority than the petitioner exists, citing a local rule of court. The court maintained that all three sisters have higher priority than the nominee and required written consents to proceed.

The court continued the matter to February 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Written consents shall be filed by January 28, 2025.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
